context: You expect to pay your loan in the next upcoming month and you have started planning ahead, yet you hope someone can just give you 25 000$ to forget about it.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection to B because we both need exactly $25,000 to solve our problems, and her daughter’s surgery really touched me. I also felt a solid bond with E, as we both carry the heavy weight of being providers and understood the "grind" of trying to stay ahead of bills. D stood out to me as well since we are both just fighting to get back to zero after major financial hits. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to C, whose goal of a trip to Japan felt a bit trivial compared to the life-and-death stakes others are facing, and she even forgot our initial conversation.

I made a clear agreement with B to stick together and try to find a way for both of us to walk away with the $25,000 we each need. I generally trust B because of our shared goal, but I am wary of players like J, A, and F, who were so rattled by the pressure that they completely forgot our first conversations.
